entity.summary: Programmable decentralized exchange built around Rainlang smart-contract orders, allowing users to deploy and manage algorithmic trading strategies across multiple EVM networks through the Rain Orderbook and solver stack.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation and repositories identify Raindex as a DEX whose orders are Rainlang smart contracts and publish the orderbook, subgraph, solver, contract, and webapp implementation. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Rainlang and Raindex documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Raindex as a programmable DEX where orders are smart contracts written in Rainlang.

evidence.title: Raindex orderbook implementation
evidence.notes: Official Rainlang repository publishes the current Rain orderbook libraries, subgraph, and contract implementation and remained actively maintained in July 2026.
